```{r}
                               metadata_info = c(Conditions="Conditions", Numerator=NULL, Denominator = "Vehicle"),
                               pval ="aov",
                               padj="fdr",
                              # metadata_feature = MappingInfo,
                               core=TRUE)



# volcano with names
DMA_Vehicle_vs_Type_1 <-  DMA_Annova[["dma"]][["Vehicle_vs_Type_1"]]
# Run with default parameter --> only need to provide Input_data and the title we like
MetaProViz::viz_volcano(data=DMA_Vehicle_vs_Type_1%>%column_to_rownames("Metabolite"),
                       x= "Log2(Distance)", select_label = NULL)

```


### ----------- THE END -----------










# DMA correlation and lolipop
```{r}
DMA_dir <- file.path(output.dir, "4. DMA")
if (!dir.exists(DMA_dir)) dir.create(DMA_dir, recursive = TRUE)
# Pick your two files manually
csv_files <- list.files(path = DMA_dir,  pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = T)
# Select input files
# csv_files[1]
file1 <- csv_files[1]  # or replace with the actual index/name
# csv_files[2]
file2 <- csv_files[2]

# Load data
df1 <- read.csv(file1)
df2 <- read.csv(file2)

df1_sub <- df1[, c("Metabolite", "Log2_Distance")]
df2_sub <- df2[, c("Metabolite", "Log2_Distance")]

colnames(df1_sub) <- c("Metabolite", "log2FC_df1")
colnames(df2_sub) <- c("Metabolite", "log2FC_df2")


merged_logFC <- merge(df1_sub, df2_sub, by = "Metabolite")

merged_logFC <- merged_logFC %>%
  mutate(
    direction_df1 = sign(log2FC_df1),
    direction_df2 = sign(log2FC_df2),
    same_direction = direction_df1 == direction_df2,
    df2_higher_magnitude = abs(log2FC_df2) > abs(log2FC_df1),
    highlight = same_direction & df2_higher_magnitude
  )


# DMA_corr_plot <- ggplot(merged_logFC, aes(x = log2FC_df1, y = log2FC_df2)) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = highlight), size = 2) +
#   geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
#   labs(
#     x = paste0("Log2FC_" ,sub(".*t_test_(.*?)\\.csv$", "\\1", file1)),
#     y = paste0("Log2FC_" ,sub(".*t_test_(.*?)\\.csv$", "\\1", file2)),
#     title = "Comparison of log2 Fold Changes",
#     subtitle = paste0("Highlight: Same direction, higher magnitude in: " ,sub(".*t_test_(.*?)\\.csv$", "\\1", file2))
#   ) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "dodgerblue")) +
#   coord_fixed(xlim = c(-8, 8), ylim = c(-10, 11)) +
#   theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")
# 
# ggsave(file.path(output.dir, "DMA_correlation_plot.svg"),  plot = DMA_corr_plot, width = 60, height = 40, units = "cm")

colnames(merged_logFC)[2] <- paste0(colnames(merged_logFC)[2],"_" ,sub( ".*t\\.test_([^/]+)\\.csv$", "\\1", file1) )
colnames(merged_logFC)[3] <- paste0(colnames(merged_logFC)[3],"_" ,sub( ".*t\\.test_([^/]+)\\.csv$", "\\1", file2) )
colnames(merged_logFC)[7] <- gsub("df2_", paste0(sub(".*t\\.test_([^/]+)\\.csv$", "\\1", file2), "_") ,colnames(merged_logFC)[7]  )
merged_logFC <- merged_logFC[,-c(4,5,8)]


SameDirection <- merged_logFC %>% filter(same_direction == TRUE)
OppositeDirection <- merged_logFC %>% filter(same_direction != TRUE)

write.csv(merged_logFC, file.path(output.dir, "DMA_correlations_log2FC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```

# lolipop
```{r}
data <- SameDirection # or OppositeDirection
# Reshape to long format
long_df <- data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("log2FC_"),
    names_to = "Condition",
    values_to = "log2FC"
  )

# Optional: Clean up condition labels
long_df$Condition <- gsub("log2FC_df1_","", long_df$Condition)
long_df$Condition <- gsub("log2FC_df2_", "",long_df$Condition)

# Sort metabolites by the Homozygous condition log2FC values
sorted_metabolites <- data %>%
  arrange(desc(colnames(data)[2])) %>%
  pull(Metabolite)

# Reorder the factor levels
long_df$Metabolite <- factor(long_df$Metabolite, levels = sorted_metabolites)

# Plot
lolipop <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = log2FC, y = Metabolite, color = Condition)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = log2FC, y = Metabolite, yend = Metabolite),
               size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "log2 Distance",
    y = "Metabolite",
    title = "Lollipop Plot of Same direction log2 Fold Changes",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(output.dir, "DMA_lolipop_same_direction.svg"),  plot = lolipop, width = 30, height = 40, units = "cm")


data <- OppositeDirection # or OppositeDirection
# Reshape to long format
long_df <- data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("log2FC_"),
    names_to = "Condition",
    values_to = "log2FC"
  )

# Optional: Clean up condition labels
long_df$Condition <- gsub("log2FC_df1_","", long_df$Condition)
long_df$Condition <- gsub("log2FC_df2_", "",long_df$Condition)

# Sort metabolites by the Homozygous condition log2FC values
sorted_metabolites <- data %>%
  arrange(desc(colnames(data)[2])) %>%
  pull(Metabolite)

# Reorder the factor levels
long_df$Metabolite <- factor(long_df$Metabolite, levels = sorted_metabolites)

# Plot
lolipop <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = log2FC, y = Metabolite, color = Condition)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = log2FC, y = Metabolite, yend = Metabolite),
               size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "log2 Distancee",
    y = "Metabolite",
    title = "Lollipop Plot of Same direction log2 Fold Changes",
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(file.path(output.dir, "DMA_lolipop_Opposite_direction.svg"),  plot = lolipop, width = 30, height = 40, units = "cm")
```

# mixed models test
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
})

# =========================
# INPUT OBJECTS YOU HAVE:
#   SSFsave   (metadata; rownames are sample IDs)
#   data_norm (matrix/data.frame; rownames are sample IDs)
# =========================

# ---- settings ----
fc_cutoff  <- 0.5
fdr_cutoff <- 0.1

output.dir <- output.dir  # you already have this in your pipeline
DMA_dir <- file.path(output.dir, "4. DMA_MixedModel_Unmerged")
dir.create(DMA_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---- align sample info to data ----
stopifnot(all(rownames(data_norm) %in% rownames(SSFsave)))

sample_info <- SSFsave[match(rownames(data_norm), rownames(SSFsave)), , drop=FALSE]
sample_info$sample_id <- rownames(data_norm)

sample_info$Conditions <- factor(sample_info$Conditions)
sample_info$`Biological Replicate` <- factor(sample_info$`Biological Replicate`)
sample_info$`Technical Replicate`  <- factor(sample_info$`Technical Replicate`)

# OPTIONAL: if you want log2 scale, uncomment:
# data_norm <- log2(data_norm)

# =========================
# function: one contrast
# =========================
run_lmer_contrast <- function(mat, sample_info,
                              group1, group2,
                              outdir,
                              fc_cutoff = 0.5,
                              fdr_cutoff = 0.1) {
  
  dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # subset samples for the two groups
  keep <- sample_info$Conditions %in% c(group1, group2)
  si   <- droplevels(sample_info[keep, ])
  
  # set ref so coefficient = group1 - group2
  si$Conditions <- relevel(factor(si$Conditions), ref = group2)
  
  mat_sub <- mat[si$sample_id, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # long format
  df_long <- mat_sub |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    tibble::rownames_to_column("sample_id") |>
    pivot_longer(-sample_id, names_to = "Metabolite", values_to = "value") |>
    left_join(
      si |> select(sample_id, Conditions, `Biological Replicate`, `Technical Replicate`),
      by = "sample_id"
    )
  
  # fit per metabolite
  res <- df_long |>
    group_by(Metabolite) |>
    group_modify(~{
      d <- .x
      if (all(is.na(d$value))) return(tibble(log2FC = NA_real_, p.val = NA_real_))
      
      # mixed model: tech reps are repeated measures within the same bio replicate
      fit <- tryCatch(
        lmer(value ~ Conditions + (1 | `Biological Replicate`), data = d, REML = FALSE),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      
      if (is.null(fit)) {
        # fallback (rare): use t-test on group means per biological replicate
        d2 <- d |>
          group_by(Conditions, `Biological Replicate`) |>
          summarise(v = mean(value, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
        
        x1 <- d2$v[d2$Conditions == group1]
        x2 <- d2$v[d2$Conditions == group2]
        
        est  <- mean(x1, na.rm=TRUE) - mean(x2, na.rm=TRUE)
        pval <- tryCatch(t.test(x1, x2)$p.value, error=function(e) NA_real_)
        return(tibble(log2FC = est, p.val = pval))
      }
      
      coefs <- summary(fit)$coefficients
      term  <- paste0("Conditions", group1)
      
      if (!term %in% rownames(coefs)) return(tibble(log2FC = NA_real_, p.val = NA_real_))
      
      tibble(
        log2FC = unname(coefs[term, "Estimate"]),
        p.val  = unname(coefs[term, "Pr(>|t|)"])
      )
    }) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(
      p.adjusted   = p.adjust(p.val, method = "fdr"),
      neglog10_fdr = -log10(p.adjusted),
      Comparison   = paste0(group1, "_Vs_", group2),
      Significance = case_when(
        !is.na(p.adjusted) & p.adjusted < fdr_cutoff & abs(log2FC) > fc_cutoff & log2FC > 0 ~ "Up",
        !is.na(p.adjusted) & p.adjusted < fdr_cutoff & abs(log2FC) > fc_cutoff & log2FC < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      )
    )
  
  # save csv
  out_csv <- file.path(outdir, paste0("lmer_", group1, "_Vs_", group2, ".csv"))
  write.csv(res, out_csv, row.names = FALSE)
  
  # volcano
  p <- ggplot(res, aes(x = log2FC, y = neglog10_fdr)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Significance), size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(fdr_cutoff), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-fc_cutoff, fc_cutoff), linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(Up="red", Down="blue", NS="grey")) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
      subtitle = "lmer: value ~ Condition + (1|Biological Replicate)",
      x = "Effect (group1 - group2)",
      y = "-log10(FDR)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
  
  p_lab <- p +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = res |> filter(Significance != "NS"),
      aes(label = Metabolite),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 50,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      segment.color = "grey50"
    )
  
  ggsave(file.path(outdir, paste0("Volcano_lmer_", group1, "_Vs_", group2, ".svg")),
         plot = p_lab, width = 10, height = 8)
  
  ggsave(file.path(outdir, paste0("Volcano_lmer_", group1, "_Vs_", group2, "_ZOOM.svg")),
         plot = p_lab, width = 28, height = 18, limitsize = FALSE)
  
  invisible(res)
}

# =========================
# RUN BOTH COMPARISONS
# =========================
res_Type1 <- run_lmer_contrast(
  mat = data_norm,
  sample_info = sample_info,
  group1 = "Type_1",
  group2 = "Vehicle",
  outdir = file.path(DMA_dir, "Type_1_Vs_Vehicle"),
  fc_cutoff = fc_cutoff,
  fdr_cutoff = fdr_cutoff
)

res_Type2 <- run_lmer_contrast(
  mat = data_norm,
  sample_info = sample_info,
  group1 = "Type_2",
  group2 = "Vehicle",
  outdir = file.path(DMA_dir, "Type_2_Vs_Vehicle"),
  fc_cutoff = fc_cutoff,
  fdr_cutoff = fdr_cutoff
)


```



# Session information
```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
options(width = 120)
sessioninfo::session_info()
```

# Bibliography
